activities_projects.title: Critical Analysis of Marginalisation
activities_projects.objective: Understand the causes and effects of marginalisation
steps: Read the section on marginalisation carefully
Write three reasons why certain groups become marginalised
Explain how marginalisation affects their lives

activities_projects.title: Case Study on Adivasi Communities
activities_projects.objective: Understand the challenges faced by Adivasi communities
steps: Read the story of Adivasi communities in the chapter
List two problems faced by Adivasis
Explain how these problems affect their livelihoods
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyses issues faced by Adivasi communities

activities_projects.title: Debate on Social Equality
activities_projects.objective: Develop critical thinking about equality in society
steps: Organise a class debate on the topic 'All communities should have equal opportunities'
Prepare arguments supporting the statement
Write a summary of the key points discussed
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Evaluates the importance of equal opportunities
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of arguments and summary (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparing Different Marginalised Groups
activities_projects.objective: Understand the experiences of different marginalised groups
steps: Choose two groups mentioned in the chapter (for example Adivasis and Muslims)
Write the problems faced by each group
Compare how their experiences are similar or different

activities_projects.title: Role of the Constitution
activities_projects.objective: Understand how the Constitution protects marginalised groups
steps: Identify rights mentioned in the Constitution that support equality
Explain how these rights protect marginalised communities
Write why these protections are important

activities_projects.title: Research on Social Discrimination
activities_projects.objective: Understand how discrimination leads to marginalisation
steps: Find an example of discrimination in society
Write how it affects a group of people
Explain how society can reduce such discrimination
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises causes and solutions to discrimination

activities_projects.title: Role Play on Inclusion
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of inclusion in society
steps: Create a situation where someone feels excluded
Act out how others help the person feel included
Explain what lesson the role play teaches

activities_projects.title: Comparing Urban and Rural Challenges
activities_projects.objective: Understand how marginalisation may differ by location
steps: Write two problems faced by marginalised groups in rural areas
Write two problems faced in urban areas
Explain the reasons for these differences

activities_projects.title: Critical Thinking: Society Without Equality
steps: Imagine a society where equality does not exist
Write three problems that might occur
Explain how equality helps prevent these problems

activities_projects.title: Essay on Marginalisation in Society
steps: Write an essay explaining marginalisation
Include examples of marginalised groups
Explain why equality and inclusion are important for society
